prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Review this session and sharpen the sharing artifact. Read everything in module-7/

risks_fired.evidence: tell me in 3-5 lines: which file you rewrote, what you added, what you sharpened, what you removed, and why
risks_fired.fix_hint: The before-and-after quote requirement partially mitigates this; strengthen by adding 'if you cannot quote the before-line, do not claim the change was made'

risks_fired.evidence: Be harsher than feels polite. If the people plan had no names, say so plainly.
risks_fired.fix_hint: The explicit instruction fights charity in the audit pass but the rewrite step carries no anti-charity framing; add 'the rewrite must surface the gap, not smooth it over' to the rewrite paragraph

risks_fired.evidence: Review this session and sharpen the sharing artifact. Read everything in module-7/ [...] Then look back over the session [...] Then rewrite [...] When you're done, tell me
risks_fired.fix_hint: Multi-step sequenced prompt without a 'no preamble' instruction; prime the student after the block: 'Claude will narrate before acting; skim past the opening sentence and look for the confirmed file path'

risks_fired.evidence: rewrite the file as the better version
risks_fired.fix_hint: The audit step is armed against niceness tax but the rewrite instruction is not; add 'keep the edge in the critique — the gap between the people plan and real ownership is the message, not a finding to soften'

rerun_note: PASS after Agents 101 rebase and surgical prompt/body edits on 2026-05-04; body-callout/self-audit calibration applied where evidence-backed Debriefs are intentional.
